# Appendix: Regression through the origin {#regression-through-origin}

```{r regression-through-origin-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/regression-through-origin-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/regression-through-origin/"
)
```

```{r child-regression-through-origin, child="../lecture-content/37-regression-through-origin.Rmd"}
```
